rationale: The cited paper appears as part of grouped background citations about salesperson-customer relationships and loyalty, not as a focal building block of the study's theory or empirics. In the introduction, it is cited with other work to note prior turnover-loyalty linkages, and the authors explicitly say those studies do not address the incentive issues central to this paper. It is also briefly cited later for a general hunter-farmer job design point, without specific mechanism, measure, or method uptake from the cited study.
